'''vathudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaalhaai|vaalhaai]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaalhaai|vaalhaai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vathudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væthidhith|væthidhith]] || [[word:væthidhij|væthidhij]] || [[word:væthidhish|væthidhish]] || [[word:væthidhi|væthidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vathuthudhuth|vathuthudhuth]] || [[word:vathuthudhuj|vathuthudhuj]] || [[word:vathuthudhush|vathuthudhush]] || [[word:vathuthudhu|vathuthudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vathudhuth|vathudhuth]] || [[word:vathudhuj|vathudhuj]] || [[word:vathudhush|vathudhush]] || [[word:vathudhu|vathudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vathufdhuth|vathufdhuth]] || [[word:vathufdhuj|vathufdhuj]] || [[word:vathufdhush|vathufdhush]] || [[word:vathufdhuf|vathufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vathudhuthu|vathudhuthu]] || [[word:vathudhuju|vathudhuju]] || [[word:vathudhushu|vathudhushu]] || [[word:vathudhuku|vathudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vathudhuth|vathudhuth]] || [[word:vathudhuj|vathudhuj]] || [[word:vathudhush|vathudhush]] || [[word:vathudhu|vathudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vathudhuthul|vathudhuthul]] || [[word:vathudhujul|vathudhujul]] || [[word:vathudhushul|vathudhushul]] || [[word:vathudhukul|vathudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vathudhuthuthu|vathudhuthuthu]] || [[word:vathudhujuju|vathudhujuju]] || [[word:vathudhushushu|vathudhushushu]] || [[word:vathudhuku|vathudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vathudhuthun|vathudhuthun]] || [[word:vathudhujun|vathudhujun]] || [[word:vathudhushun|vathudhushun]] || [[word:vathudhukun|vathudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vathudhuthuoro|vathudhuthuoro]] || [[word:vathudhujuoro|vathudhujuoro]] || [[word:vathudhushuoro|vathudhushuoro]] || [[word:vathudhukuoro|vathudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
